markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather user feedback on the AILA growth community from an aspirational founder.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Value Driver:** Access to Marcel & Jason's methodology and thinking, not just content. The community's credibility is the main draw for aspirational founders.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [**Key Feature Request:** Cohort-based Q\&A sessions with Marcel & Jason to provide direct, personalized guidance, a format proven highly engaging in other communities.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Major UX Barrier:** The Circle platform's 20+ navigation tabs create overwhelming choice, preventing users from finding relevant content and hindering time-to-value.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Engagement Tactic:** A "celebrate" channel for member wins (e.g., course sales) creates positive peer pressure and reinforces the community's value.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Topics

### User Profile & Motivation

  - [**Background:** Instructional Designer building a side project; aims to join a startup as a founding member or launch one.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Joined the community after a Luma event ("Winning AI search with content quality") to learn growth and marketing fundamentals for a startup.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** To immerse in the thinking of world-class operators (Marcel & Jason) to build a foundational understanding, even if the direct application is 1–2 years away.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)

### Community Experience & Barriers

  - [**Onboarding:** The Circle platform's 20+ navigation tabs are overwhelming → creates analysis paralysis and prevents users from finding relevant content.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Content Consumption:** Limited to the initial Luma event recording and the "Zero to 7 Million" video.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**Engagement:** Minimal, primarily browsing posts in the general chat.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Feature Requests & Engagement Tactics

  - [**Cohort-Based Q\&A Sessions:**](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Format:** Bi-weekly or monthly calls with Marcel & Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Process:** Members submit questions in advance for direct answers.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides personalized guidance and direct access to experts, a format proven highly engaging in other communities.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Personalized Onboarding:**](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Concept:** A guided path tailored to user personas (e.g., "Aspirational Founder," "Growth Marketer").](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Action:** Directs new users to the most relevant content to accelerate time-to-value.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**"Celebrate" Channel:**](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Concept:** A dedicated channel for members to share their wins and milestones.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Creates positive peer pressure and reinforces the community's value by showcasing tangible results.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will:** Recommend the Anna Baird podcast episode to Gabrielle, as it covers founder pitfalls and building conviction.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Gabrielle:** Attend the upcoming co-marketing workshop with Lovable on Dec 9th at 11 AM Pacific.](https://fathom.video/share/7FBXYqb_T-H7R9jkc9x5FP3XCEKMwvbh?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
